## Solution
---
#### Approach: Using **subquery** and `MAX()` function [Accepted]

**Algorithm**

Use subquery to select all the numbers appearing just one time.

```sql
SELECT
    num
FROM
    my_numbers
GROUP BY num
HAVING COUNT(num) = 1;
```

Then choose the biggest one using `MAX()`.

```sql
SELECT
    MAX(num) AS num
FROM
    (SELECT
        num
    FROM
        my_numbers
    GROUP BY num
    HAVING COUNT(num) = 1) AS t;
```
